## UrlHandler.updateUrlWithPush() method

Updates the browser URL with the new [UrlParams](./x-components.urlparams.md) using the history `pushState` method.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
updateUrlWithPush(newUrlParams: UrlParams): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  newUrlParams | [UrlParams](./x-components.urlparams.md) | The new params to update browser URL. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
